package rulecoverage

func PositiveSortSliceVsSortSort() string {
    ruleID := "sort_slice_vs_sort_sort"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(s))` or custom `sort.Interface` implementations for basic types"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
